compiled_state.title: [test-index]: stale RED marker covers passing tests -> test gate masks failures
compiled_state.author: Worktree
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.

## Actual Behavior
.test-index entries for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket and plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh have stale RED marker [test_ticket_tag_via_library]. Tests 9-11 (ticket_link, ticket_list, ticket_transition) are now implemented and appear after this marker in test-ticket-lib-api.sh, causing the test gate to tolerate failures from passing tests.

## Expected Behavior
RED marker [test_ticket_tag_via_library] should be removed from both .test-index entries since ticket_tag is now implemented and all tests after the marker are also passing.

## Fix
Remove [test_ticket_tag_via_library] from both .test-index lines for plugins/dso/scripts/ticket and plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh.
File: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib-api.sh
Category: verification
